title: GCP Service Account
description: GCP credentials for Google Cloud Composer. Supports service account values, credentials path, workload identity (external account), and ADC. Tokens are auto-refreshed at runtime.

iapAudience.title: IAP Audience
iapAudience.description: Audience claim of the OIDC ID token used to authenticate against IAP-protected Cloud Composer. Accepts either a classic IAP OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Composer 1 / older Composer 2 environments) or any BYOID audience string configured via 'gcloud composer environments update --airflow-byoid-audiences=...' (Composer 2/3 with airflowByoidConfig.audiences). When omitted, OpenMetadata auto-detects it from the IAP login redirect or the Composer Admin API. Set explicitly only when both auto-detection paths are blocked (custom domains, restricted egress, service account without composer.environments.get).
